alkylation reagent: 10 mM iodoacetamide was added rapidly until the liquid covered the gel
alkylation concentration: 10 mM iodoacetamide was added rapidly until the liquid covered the gel
cleavage agent: the gel was then completely covered with the 0.01 μg/μl trypsin
enrichment method: immunoprecipitation with Protein G agarose beads
fractionation method: resolved by SDS-PAGE and followed by immunoblotting analysis
instrument: using a Q_Exactive plus mass spectrometer
reduction reagent: 10 mM DTT was added until the liquid covered the gel
reduction concentration: 10 mM DTT was added until the liquid covered the gel
